case_title: BEFFORD BILLY et al VS CHU WEI KIAN et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BEFFORD BILLY BEFFORD MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHU WEI KIAN CHU TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHU WEI KIAN CHU TOM
